class.name: SpinePhysicsConstraint
class.brief_description: Stores the current pose for a physics constraint that applies physics to bones.
class.description:
A physics constraint applies physics simulation to bones, allowing them to move and react based on physical forces like gravity, inertia, and momentum.
See [url=https://esotericsoftware.com/spine-physics-constraints]Physics constraints[/url] in the Spine User Guide.

method.name: update
method.description: Updates the physics constraint. The physics parameter determines how physics are applied. See [enum SpineConstant.Physics].

method.name: get_data
method.description: Returns the data for this physics constraint.

method.name: get_bone
method.description: Returns the bone constrained by this physics constraint.

method.name: set_bone
method.description: Sets the bone constrained by this physics constraint.

method.name: get_pose
method.description: Returns the current pose for this physics constraint.

method.name: get_applied_pose
method.description: Returns the applied pose for this physics constraint.

method.name: translate
method.description: Translates the physics constraint so next update forces are applied as if the bone moved an additional amount in world space.

method.name: rotate
method.description: Rotates the physics constraint so next update forces are applied as if the bone rotated around the specified point in world space.
